---
title: "hnrnph1 Phylogenetic Tree with SpliceAI max2 Scores (v3)"
author: "Analysis"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
    theme: flatly
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
    echo = TRUE,
    warning = FALSE,
    message = FALSE,
    fig.width = 14,
    fig.height = 12
)
```

# Load Libraries

```{r load-libraries}
# Load packages
library(ggplot2)
library(ggtree)
library(ape)
library(ggnewscale) # For new_scale_color() to add multiple color scales
library(data.table)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)

assign(
    "is.waive",
    ggforce:::is.waive,
    envir = .GlobalEnv
)
```

# Define File Paths

```{r define-paths}
# Base path
base_path <- "/home/mikej10/advbfx/intronretention/hnRNPH1_IR_MAF"

# SpliceAI scores file (v3.1)
spliceai_scores_file <- file.path(base_path, "results", "splice_out_v3.1", "all_spliceai_scores_v3.1.tsv")

# Phylogenetic tree file (using common names version)
tree_file <- file.path(base_path, "reference", "hg38.100way.commonNames.nh")

# Tree to clade mapping file (pre-computed mapping)
tree_clade_mapping_file <- file.path(base_path, "results", "tree_to_clade_mapping.tsv")

# Target decoy ID
target_decoy <- "HNRNPH1_179620582"
```

# Load and Parse SpliceAI Data

```{r load-spliceai-data}
# Load SpliceAI scores
spliceai_data <- fread(spliceai_scores_file, sep = "\t", header = TRUE)

# Filter for target decoy
target_row <- spliceai_data[decoyID == target_decoy]

if (nrow(target_row) == 0) {
    stop(paste("Decoy ID", target_decoy, "not found in SpliceAI scores file"))
}

cat("Found decoy:", target_decoy, "\n")
cat("Number of species columns:", ncol(target_row) - 1, "\n")

# Function to parse [max1][pos1][max2][pos2][d] format
parse_score_format <- function(value) {
    # Match pattern: [number][number][number][number][number]
    match_result <- str_match(value, "\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]\\[(\\d+)\\]\\[([\\d.-]+)\\]")
    if (is.na(match_result[1])) {
        return(list(max1 = NA, pos1 = NA, max2 = NA, pos2 = NA, d = NA))
    }
    return(list(
        max1 = as.numeric(match_result[2]),
        pos1 = as.integer(match_result[3]),
        max2 = as.numeric(match_result[4]),
        pos2 = as.integer(match_result[5]),
        d = as.numeric(match_result[6])
    ))
}

# Get species columns (all except decoyID)
species_cols <- setdiff(names(target_row), "decoyID")

# Parse max2 values for each species
species_max2 <- data.frame(
    species_id = character(),
    max2 = numeric(),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)

for (species in species_cols) {
    score_str <- target_row[[species]][1]
    parsed <- parse_score_format(score_str)
    
    if (!is.na(parsed$max2) && parsed$max2 != -1.0) {
        species_max2 <- rbind(species_max2, data.frame(
            species_id = species,
            max2 = parsed$max2,
            stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
    }
}

cat("\nParsed max2 scores:\n")
cat("  Total species with valid max2 scores:", nrow(species_max2), "\n")
cat("  Max max2 value:", max(species_max2$max2, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  Min max2 value:", min(species_max2$max2, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("  Mean max2 value:", mean(species_max2$max2, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
```

# Load Tree and Mapping Data

```{r load-tree-data}
# Load tree to clade mapping
tree_clade_map <- read.table(
    tree_clade_mapping_file,
    header = TRUE,
    sep = "\t",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
    quote = "",
    comment.char = ""
)

# Read the phylogenetic tree (using common names)
tree <- read.tree(tree_file)

# Create lookup for tree names to clades/species_id
tree_name_to_clade <- setNames(tree_clade_map$clade, tree_clade_map$tree_name)
tree_name_to_species_id <- setNames(tree_clade_map$species_id, tree_clade_map$tree_name)

# Map tree tip labels to clades using the pre-computed mapping
tip_to_clade <- tree_name_to_clade[tree$tip.label]
tip_to_species_id <- tree_name_to_species_id[tree$tip.label]
names(tip_to_clade) <- tree$tip.label
names(tip_to_species_id) <- tree$tip.label

# Create lookup: species_id -> max2
species_to_max2 <- setNames(species_max2$max2, species_max2$species_id)

# Map max2 data to tree names via species_id
tip_species_ids <- tip_to_species_id[tree$tip.label]
tip_max2_signal <- species_to_max2[tip_species_ids]
names(tip_max2_signal) <- tree$tip.label

# Format max2 signal for display (round to 4 decimal places, leave NA as blank)
tip_max2_label <- ifelse(
    is.na(tip_max2_signal),
    "",
    sprintf("%.4f", tip_max2_signal)
)

# Create data frame for tip labels with clade and max2 signal
tip_data <- data.frame(
    label = tree$tip.label,
    clade = as.character(tip_to_clade),
    species_id = as.character(tip_to_species_id),
    group = as.character(tip_to_clade),
    max2_signal = tip_max2_signal,
    max2_label = tip_max2_label,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
tip_data$group[is.na(tip_data$group) | tip_data$group == ""] <- "Unknown"

# Create tip labels with max2 annotation (leave blank if no max2 data)
tip_data$tip_label_with_max2 <- ifelse(
    tip_data$max2_label == "" | is.na(tip_data$max2_label),
    tip_data$label,
    paste0(tip_data$label, " (", tip_data$max2_label, ")")
)

# Define color scheme for clades
clade_colors <- c(
    "Primate" = "#d95f02",
    "Euarchontoglires" = "#1b9e77",
    "Laurasiatheria" = "#7570b3",
    "Afrotheria" = "#e7298a",
    "Mammal" = "#66a61e",
    "Aves" = "#e6ab02",
    "Sarcopterygii" = "#a6761d",
    "Fish" = "#666666",
    "Unknown" = "gray50"
)

cat("\nTree data loaded:\n")
cat("  Total species in tree:", length(tree$tip.label), "\n")
cat("  Species with max2 scores:", sum(!is.na(tip_data$max2_signal)), "\n")
cat("  Species without max2 scores:", sum(is.na(tip_data$max2_signal)), "\n")
```

# Phylogenetic Tree with SpliceAI max2 Scores

```{r phylogenetic-tree-max2, fig.height=14, fig.width=12}
# Create tree plot colored by clade (branches)
p1 <- ggtree(tree, layout = "slanted", aes(color = group)) %<+% tip_data +
    theme_tree2() +
    scale_color_manual(
        values = clade_colors,
        name = "Clade",
        na.value = "gray50"
    ) +
    new_scale_color() +
    # Color tip labels by max2 score
    geom_tiplab(
        aes(color = max2_signal, label = tip_label_with_max2),
        size = 2.5,
        show.legend = TRUE,
        offset = 0.001
    ) +
    scale_color_gradient(
        low = "blue",
        high = "red",
        name = "max2 Score",
        na.value = "gray30",
        guide = guide_colorbar(title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5)
    )

print(p1)
```

# Summary

```{r summary-info}
cat("\n=== Summary ===\n")
cat("Target decoy:", target_decoy, "\n")
cat("Total species in tree:", length(tree$tip.label), "\n")
cat("Species with clade mappings:", sum(!is.na(tip_to_clade) & tip_to_clade != ""), "\n")
cat("\n=== SpliceAI max2 Scores ===\n")
cat("Species with max2 scores:", sum(!is.na(tip_data$max2_signal)), "\n")
cat("Species without max2 scores:", sum(is.na(tip_data$max2_signal)), "\n")
if (sum(!is.na(tip_data$max2_signal)) > 0) {
    cat("Mean max2 score:", sprintf("%.4f", mean(tip_data$max2_signal, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")
    cat("Max max2 score:", sprintf("%.4f", max(tip_data$max2_signal, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")
    cat("Min max2 score:", sprintf("%.4f", min(tip_data$max2_signal, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")
}
```
